highlights.text: GPU marketplace search — filter by model, VRAM, price, location, reliability
Bid pricing — interruptible instances with dynamic bid management
Container-native — Docker images, onstart scripts, templates
Dual write-gate — env var + per-call confirm for all 8 destructive ops

readme:
### What it does

Vast.ai GPU Marketplace provides 16 MCP tools for searching and provisioning GPU compute on the Vast.ai peer-to-peer marketplace. Search available GPU offers from hosts worldwide, accept offers to create instances, manage bid pricing, and track billing.

### Tool coverage

| Domain | Tools | What you can do |
|--------|-------|-----------------|
| Offers | 2 | Search GPU offers with filters, browse pre-built templates |
| Instances | 7 | List, get, create, delete, start, stop, reboot GPU instances |
| Extras | 3 | Fetch logs, set labels, change bid prices |
| SSH Keys | 2 | List and add SSH keys |
| Account | 2 | Account info with balance, billing invoices |

### GPU provisioning flow

Search offers (`vastai_search_offers` with GPU model, VRAM, price filters), pick an offer, accept it (`vastai_instance_create` with `offer_id`, Docker image, and optional onstart script). Poll `vastai_instance_get` until status is running. SSH in via the returned host:port. Delete when done.

### Marketplace concepts

Vast.ai is a P2P GPU marketplace, not traditional IaaS. Key differences:
- **Offers** are available GPU machines from hosts. You search and accept offers — no fixed plans.
- **Bid pricing** — interruptible instances can be cheaper. Change bids dynamically.
- **Container-native** — instances run Docker images. No cloud-init. Use `onstart` for setup.
- **Templates** — pre-configured images (PyTorch, TensorFlow) for quick starts.

### Token efficiency

Formatters strip ~60% of Vast.ai's verbose API responses. Offer summaries show GPU model, VRAM, price/hr, reliability, and location — not 50+ fields of host metadata.

### Safety

All 8 write operations require dual confirmation: `VASTAI_WRITE_ENABLED=true` environment variable AND `confirm: true` per-call parameter.

env.name: VASTAI_API_KEY
env.description: Vast.ai API key for authentication — all tools require this

env.name: VASTAI_WRITE_ENABLED
env.description: Set to 'true' to enable write operations (create, delete, start, stop, reboot, change bid)

setup.blurb: GPU marketplace — 16 tools for searching offers, provisioning instances, managing bids, and tracking billing on the world's largest GPU marketplace.
setup.help_text: Get your API key at cloud.vast.ai/cli/. The key provides access to your Vast.ai account including creating instances (which incur compute charges).

fields.label: API Key
fields.help: Full-access API key. Accepting GPU offers incurs compute charges immediately.

scenarios.label: Find cheapest A100 GPU
scenarios.body: Search GPU offers filtering for A100 with at least 80GB VRAM, sort by price ascending, and show the top 5 cheapest offers with their location and reliability scores.

scenarios.label: Provision a PyTorch training instance
scenarios.body: Search for a 4x A100 offer under $5/hr, accept it with the PyTorch template, set an onstart script to clone a repo and start training, then monitor until running.

scenarios.label: Cost audit — review GPU spend
scenarios.body: List all running instances with their hourly costs, check billing invoices for the last 7 days, and identify instances that could be moved to cheaper bid pricing.

notes: First-party Stallari blade MCP. Marketplace-adapted virtualisation-v1 contract (offers replace plans, PUT /asks/{id} replaces POST /instances). TypeScript, dual transport (stdio + HTTP). 16 tools, 33 tests, dual write-gate pattern.
